summary: Completed backend-only testing of multi-scale technical analysis API. All 6 tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: 1D timeframe returns exactly 150 daily candles with correct config (lookback=150, pivot_window=5, min_pivot_distance=8)
7D timeframe returns exactly 400 daily candles with correct config (lookback=400, pivot_window=9, min_pivot_distance=15)
30D timeframe returns exactly 800 daily candles with correct config (lookback=800, pivot_window=15, min_pivot_distance=30)
Different timeframes produce different patterns (1D: symmetrical_triangle, 7D: symmetrical_triangle, 30D: ascending_triangle)
All timeframes use daily candles without aggregation (multi-scale analysis verified)
